title: PvPControl
description: Control PvP for you or an individual Player
body:
![**Are you on a Server with PVP but you don't want to participate?**

``-> Then PvPControl is your way to go.``

**This Plugin let's you control your PvP experience with disabling or enabling PvP for only yourself or another Player**


`/pvp on` turns on PvP for yourself

`/pvp off` turns off PvP for yourself

`/pvp toggle` switches from you current state to the other (off -> on) (on -> off)

`/pvp` get the state of your current PvP setting

`/pvp cooldown [seconds]` sets the Amount of seconds a player has to be out of combat to disable his pvp state

`/pvp message [chat/actionbar]` sets the display for the system messages (trying to hit player with pvp off -> message in actionbar/chat)

`/pvp [playername]` gets the state of the players current set pvp setting

## Admin

`/pvp set [playername] [on/off]` sets the state of another players current pvp setting


## Permissions

```
pvpcontrol.use -> for using the pvp command
pvpcontrol.other -> for viewing another players pvp setting
pvpcontrol.admin -> for changing config and managing player states
```

## Bugs, Suggestions & Feedback

You can only post on those sites with an account on **eloxad.net**

[Bugs can be reported here](https://eloxad.net/plugins/pvpcontrol/bugs/)

[Features etc. can be suggested here](https://eloxad.net/plugins/pvpcontrol/suggest/)

[You can chat with other users here](https://eloxad.net/plugins/pvpcontrol/discussion/)
